events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! Guitar hero, astrophysicist, and Queen legend. What's your favourite Queen riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! Still strutting, still rocking. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV launch anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Oasis release Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people converged for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in music history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977, and would have been 91.

angles.name: Elvis tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who we lost 49 years ago today. His legacy lives on.

events.title: Beatles release Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. The final album recorded by the Fab Four, and what a masterpiece it is.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and trailblazer. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still rocking, still iconic. What's your favourite Oasis or solo track?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, and was the title track of his album released September 9, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released the timeless anthem 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity resonates as strongly as ever.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple launched the first generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod launch anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple unveiled the original iPod – putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing how we listen to music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years of 007. What's your favourite Bond theme tune or iconic gadget?

events.title: John Lennon turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: John Lennon's birthday
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire.
